message.content:
The page has a light blue background (hex code approximately #e6f2f5). A vertical dark teal line (hex code approximately #2d7a7a) divides the page into two sections.  

**Left Section:**  
- Contains the text "Brand Guidelines" in two lines.  
  - "Brand" is in a bold, sans-serif typeface, colored dark teal (#2d7a7a), and positioned near the top-left of the left section.  
  - "Guidelines" is in a lighter, regular-weight sans-serif typeface, also dark teal (#2d7a7a), and placed directly below "Brand".  

**Right Section:**  
- Contains a numbered list of three items, each in a lighter teal color (#5a9a9a) and a regular-weight sans-serif typeface.  
  - "01. Color Palette" is positioned at the top of the right section.  
  - "02. Logo Design" is centered vertically between "01. Color Palette" and "03. Typography".  
  - "03. Typography" is at the bottom of the right section.  

No additional design elements (icons, logos, decorative shapes) are present. The layout is clean and minimal, with the vertical line creating a clear separation between the title and the list of sections.
